message:
fix: reject non-finite floats in performance hardening metrics

Add is_finite() validation for all float fields (cold_start_ms,
warm_start_ms, and all baseline/hardened percentile values) in
PerformanceHardeningMetrics::add_metric() to fail-closed on NaN
or Infinity values before they propagate into aggregation and
regression analysis, preventing silent corruption of performance
baselines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
